selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: a positive completed-month total return for a diversified high-yield corporate-bond ETF is a market-priced risk-appetite state; a nonpositive month is a credit-risk deterioration state
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: the signal comes from high-yield credit total return and is not an equity trend, cross-asset rank, official EBP series, Treasury-rate state, VIX state or volatility budget

signal.selection: the completed calendar-month HYG total return reconstructed from raw daily closes and exact iShares sponsor cash distributions payable by the signal month-end
signal.comparison: compare the compounded completed-month total return with exactly zero
signal.target_rule: HYG completed-month total return above zero means SPY weight 1.0; a return at or below zero means SPY weight 0.0 and inactive cash
signal.split_baseline: each traded interval is independently labeled by the immediately preceding completed HYG calendar-month return
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no adjusted close, interpolation, carry-forward, alternate ETF, LQD ratio, threshold, lookback, moving average, persistence, smoothing, volatility filter, frequency variant or source blending

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: after the final accepted XNYS close of the signal month
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw SPY close on the preceding accepted signal session, available before target submission
timing_and_account.benchmark: buy-and-hold SPY over identical selected split endpoints with identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than SPY
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than SPY
uncentered type-7 0.000048828125 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(50000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the frozen three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof that all serial dependence is covered

source_identities.distribution_reconciliation: 103 of 103 ex-dates matched; exact sponsor six-decimal amounts control; Yahoo three-decimal amounts are coarse cross-check only with absolute tolerance 0.001
source_identities.spy_bundle_reuse_boundary: only execution, calendar, lifecycle, corporate-action and price identities are reused; all embedded C3 policy-state values are ignored and cannot affect this signal
source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
